description: GoPlus Security API over x402: scan token contracts and wallet addresses for honeypots, buy/sell tax, mintable/blacklist/proxy permissions and known malicious addresses. For agents running safety screening before swaps or transfers. Data by GoPlus.

endpoints.description: Token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more contracts

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}
zh-CN.title: Token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}
endpoints.title: Token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more contracts through the goplus-token-security-tron gateway route.

endpoints.title: Malicious-address check (sanctions, phishing, known scam)
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs malicious-address check (sanctions, phishing, known scam) through the goplus-token-security-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.description: 通过 x402 网关调用 GoPlus 安全检测:扫描代币合约与钱包地址的貔貅、买卖税、增发/黑名单/代理权限以及已知恶意地址。适合 Agent 在兑换或转账前做安全筛查。数据来自 GoPlus。
zh-CN.subtitle: 交易前的代币与地址安全检测:貔貅、税率、增发/黑名单权限与恶意地址。
zh-CN.title: GoPlus 安全
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

sub_title: Pre-trade token & address security - honeypot, tax, mint/blacklist permissions and malicious-address checks.
subtitle: Pre-trade token & address security - honeypot, tax, mint/blacklist permissions and malicious-address checks.
title: GoPlus
use_case: Use before buying a token, approving an allowance, or sending to an address: check if a token is a honeypot/scam, whether an address is malicious, and whether an approval is risky.
